objective: Close F-0107 by making the production user list and detail use one effective authorization read model across personal_auth and current employee org_auth sources, including active upgrades, validity windows and disabled-account precedence; apply userCategory and authFilter before pagination/count; and expose the same explicit category and edition labels in the operations UI. Preserve existing roles, masked phone delivery, account separation and authorization entitlements without schema, migration, dependency or persistent database execution.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
role, permission, entitlement, quota or default capability expansion
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApi: The production AdminOpsManagement page builds /api/v1/users query parameters and renders user category and authorization facts; the App Router route delegates directly to admin-flow-runtime.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: admin-flow-runtime authorizes ops_admin/super_admin reads but currently drops userCategory and authFilter before calling the repository.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: The production list aggregates only personal_auth status, so current employees lose org_auth edition and upgrades; filters are absent before pagination/count and detail chooses authorizations[0] instead of evaluating all effective sources.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: Existing personal_auth, employee, employee_org_auth, org_auth and auth_upgrade facts are sufficient for a read-only effective model. No schema/migration source or persistent database execution is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Focused RED will cover personal expiry plus active organization authorization, direct/upgrade advanced edition, multiple organization sources, disabled precedence, query parsing, pre-pagination filtering and explicit UI labels; direct mocks and regressions are pre-allowlisted.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: docs/01-requirements/modules/06-admin-ops.md, edition-aware authorization requirements, ADR-007, CT-REQ-046, the 2026-07-07 operations UI baseline and the local ops-users design-board row require explicit effective authorization classification while preserving service authorization.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No new role, entitlement, authorization source, schema/migration, real database access, dependency, Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR, force-push or mechanism change.
